description_long: This is a compact, black submachine gun with a sleek, modern design, reminiscent of the Heckler & Koch MP5 series. The weapon features a polymer fixed stock with a smooth, slightly contoured surface and a solid, ergonomic pistol grip. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from metal, with a matte finish and minimal external attachments, giving it a streamlined appearance. The magazine is a curved, detachable box type, inserted just ahead of the trigger guard. Iron sights are present, with a drum-style rear aperture and a protected front post, both integrated into the top of the receiver. The overall build suggests durability and ease of handling, suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, black submachine gun with a fixed polymer stock, curved box magazine, and integrated iron sights. Its streamlined, modern design is ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: The machine gun is viewed directly from the front, showing the circular muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the weapon, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, curved magazine, and the details of the receiver and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the stock, the rear sight drum, and the slim outline of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the fixed stock, pistol grip, curved magazine, and the receiver's details, with the ejection port and fire selector visible.
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: drum-style rear aperture with protected front post
